message.content:
## Build Config Analysis Summary

This repo is a **C++ LLVM compiler project** (SWPP course at SNU) with three main directories:

### Primary Project: `swpp202601-team19/`

| Aspect | Detail |
|---|---|
| **Build system** | CMake 3.28+ with Ninja generator |
| **C++ standard** | C++23 |
| **LLVM dependency** | 22.1.0 |
| **Main binary** | `swpp-compiler` (64 MB) |
| **Plugin** | `SWPPOptPlugin.so` (LLVM pass plugin) |
| **CI** | GitHub Actions (Docker-based) |
| **Formatter** | clang-format (LLVM style) |
| **Docs** | Doxygen |
| **Tests** | LLVM FileCheck via CTest |

### Build Script: `compile.sh`
- Auto-detects LLVM at `/opt/llvm-22.1.0` (overridable via `LLVM_ROOT`)
- Runs `cmake -S . -GNinja -Bbuild` + `cmake --build build`

### CMake Hierarchy (7 CMakeLists.txt)
Root -> `src/` -> `src/lib/` -> `src/lib/opt/` (19 opt passes) + `src/lib/backend/` (9 backend passes) + `src/lib/backend/SWPP/` (custom target) -> `test/`

### Other Directories
- **`llvm-project/`** — Full LLVM 22.1.0 source tree (upstream, not student code)
- **`swpp202601/`** — Course specs only, no build system

### Auxiliary Tooling (in llvm-project)
- 4 VS Code extensions with `package.json` (npm + TypeScript + esbuild)
- 9 Dockerfiles, 1 docker-compose.yml (LLVM CI utilities)
- 100+ Makefiles (LLDB tests)
- No webpack/vite/babel/postcss/tailwind configs — not a JS/web project
